printed.name: Hug-a-Tree
printed.setup: Standing leaning forward, facing away from Cadillac, arms in T position, hands holding handles (fist or open hand), micro-bend in elbows, palms facing forward

movement.inhale: Move arms back, return to start position

objectives: Shoulder horizontal adductor strength and stretch
cues: Keep leaning into springs, maintaining consistent diagonal line
Move arms forward until parallel with each other
Move arms back within range of scapular stabilization
